title: Ras Tanura Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ras Tanura with a Z-Score of +4.49. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Ras Tanura has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.7 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is 27% and the wind speed is 10.2 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
